product.name: AriRipstop El
product.familyDescriptorPl: Denim i ripstop na odzież outdoor
product.familyDescriptorEn: Denim and ripstop for outdoor wear
product.categorySourceGroup: Ripstop, elasthane and denim fabrics for outdoor wear.
product.specLine: 210 g/m², 97% AriPam 3% Elasthane, Ripstop Woven Fabric
descriptions: It is used mostly for outdoor wear as pants.
AriRipstop can also be used for workear stretchable raincoats.
210 g/m², 97% AriPam 3% Elasthane, Ripstop Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1800N ; Weft > 1200N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 35N ; Weft > 40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is described explicitly as an outdoor wear ripstop fabric used for pants and workwear stretchable raincoats; no explicit military, sport, motorcycle, medical, energy, or other taxonomy-specific application is stated.
